form.formComment: Comes here off a 34-day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 14 at Albany Ladies Bracele on March 8 over 1500m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Capricious Ruler carrying 55.5kg at $11. The start before that 10th of 13 at Bunbury Prov Series on February 26 over 1400m, 7 len behind Azena with 54kg at $16. Showed enough last start to suggest she can take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 7 at York on March 15 over 1300m, 1.3 len behind Superb Vintage with 56.5kg at $31. The race before that eased back early on 8th of 10 at York on March 2 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Magic Belle carrying 56.5kg at $12. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 9 at York on April 6 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Masamune with 54kg at $6.50. Before that eased back early on 4th of 8 at York on March 15 over 1100m, 0.6 len behind Scream with 59kg at $3.50. Could sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 8 at York on April 6 over 1100m, 6 len behind Scream with 54kg at $9. The race before that 2nd of 8 at York on March 15 over 1100m, nose behind Scream with 56.5kg at $8. Has been racing well. Has ability and should measure up.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months second last of 9 at Dongara Rtg 56+ on April 4 over 1200m, 7 len behind The Rush carrying 55kg at $61. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at Broome Cl2 on August 2 over 1300m, 13 len behind Spice Is Right carrying 55.5kg at $16. Fitter but looking to others.
